headline: AES Robotics Milestone Puts Spotlight On Long Term Renewables Returns
summary: AES subsidiary Maximo has used robotics to install 100 megawatts of utility scale solar capacity at the Bellefield complex. This project marks Maximo’s shift from early deployment to ongoing commercial production for robotic solar installation. The achievement is aimed at addressing labor constraints, safety, cost, and project timelines in large scale solar construction. For investors watching NYSE:AES, this development comes with the shares recently trading at $14.06 and a 1 year return of...

headline: M&A Can Be a Big Opportunity. These Stocks Look Like They Could Pop If Deals Close.
summary: One deal that should close in the next few months is Clearwater Analytics’ sale to a group of private money managers.

headline: Can AES Capitalize on Surging Data Center Energy Demand?
summary: AES taps booming data center power demand with 8.2 GW in signed PPAs, securing long-term revenues and deepening ties with tech giants like Google.

headline: Argus Research Downgrades AES to Hold
summary: Argus Research  analyst John Eade   downgrades AES (NYSE:AES) from Buy to Hold.
